description_long: This is a rectangular stone monument with a broad, flat top and a wide, stepped base. The sides of the structure are adorned with intricate bas-relief carvings, including scenes of trees, shields, and possibly mythological or historical motifs. The front and rear panels feature detailed reliefs, one with a landscape and another with a heraldic shield, while the shorter sides display more focused decorative elements. The entire structure is made of a light gray stone, giving it a solemn and monumental appearance. The base consists of several steps leading up to the main body, which is slightly raised above the surrounding platform. The surface finish is matte and slightly rough, typical of weathered stone monuments found in urban parks or plazas.
description: A rectangular stone monument with detailed bas-relief carvings and a broad, stepped base, finished in light gray stone. The structure features ornate panels and a flat top, evoking a sense of historical or commemorative significance.
description_view_0: The front view shows a wide panel with a detailed bas-relief of a landscape scene, flanked by trees and architectural elements, above a set of steps.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a narrower panel with a relief of a reclining animal or mythical creature, framed by foliage, and the side profile of the steps.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front with another wide panel, this time featuring a different relief scene, possibly with architectural motifs and trees.
description_view_3: The right side view displays a heraldic shield with decorative flourishes and foliage, set above the steps and framed by the monument's side edges.
attribute_ornamentation: Bas-relief carvings on all four sides, including landscape scenes, trees, a reclining animal or mythical creature, and a heraldic shield with decorative flourishes.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad and rectangular with multiple stone steps leading up to the main body, forming a raised platform. The steps are plain but substantial, supporting the ornate upper section.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, with no visible ornamentation or unique features; it is simply the smooth, broad top surface of the monument.
